title: Optimized Project
description: Simple builds that will optimize and simplify your game!
body:
# Optimized Project

**This is a modpacks that will increase your FPS and enhance your game. Modpacks are suitable for both single-player and multiplayer.**

The build uses different cores for different purposes. Therefore, you will find the perfect modpack for you. Mods are also used that not only optimize, but also make the game easier.

**Good game!**
